title: 2023 DPA Company Landscape Analysis
summary: Large enterprises (32.2%) and startups (28.5%) are the top destinations for designers, followed by agency/consulting firms (20.4%). Banking & Capital Markets (20.1%) and Consumer Products (19.8%) are the leading industries. Hybrid work is the norm at 71.8%, with 16.7% fully remote and 11.5% in-office. Most designers work at local companies (62.2% at HQ). The most common design team size is 2-10 people (54.2%). Non-local companies offer 67.1% higher median pay. Fully remote roles offer over 2.7x higher compensation than in-office roles. Banking/Capital Markets and Consumer Products are the top-paying industries.
methodology: Analysis of company type, industry, company size, design team size, headquarters location, work arrangement, and work hours among survey respondents. Compensation analysis by company characteristics based on Singapore respondents only.
